message:
refactor(tokio-compat): add AsupersyncRuntime accessors and remove unused imports

Add cx() and region_id() accessor methods to AsupersyncRuntime so
callers can inspect the captured context and region without reaching
into internal fields. Rename the underlying Cx::region() call to
region_id() to match the upstream API rename.

- runtime.rs: add pub const fn cx() -> &Cx and region_id() -> RegionId
- runtime.rs: update constructor and test to use cx.region_id()
- hyper_bridge.rs: remove unused Mutex and Waker imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
